intentSynonyms: create a build hook in netlify
add a build hook in netlify
make a new build hook in netlify
open a new build hook in netlify
description: Create a new build hook for a Netlify site. Build hooks generate a URL that triggers a new build for the specified branch when POSTed to.

site_id.description: The site ID to create the build hook for

title.description: Display title for the build hook

branch.description: Git branch to build when the hook is triggered
